---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the smart contract or tooling
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

A short summary of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the proposed change (e.g. new message, new query, config option).

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or approaches you've considered.

## Additional context

Schema impact, migration, or other notes.
